title: Semantic HTML Rendering, Contextual Escaping, and Determinism
description: Text nodes can inject markup, code is double-escaped, attributes are unquoted, heading IDs collide, dictionary order leaks into output, and raw HTML bypasses the trust model. Learners cumulatively produce deterministic context-safe semantic HTML renderer through theory, guided work, debugging, transfer, retrieval, and assessment.
objectives: Render each validated node through one owned semantic mapping without reparsing generated strings as source.
Encode untrusted text and attribute values for their exact HTML context and reject unsafe script, style, comment, and URL placements.
Keep trusted renderer output distinct from untrusted author text and make every conversion into trusted markup explicit and reviewable.
